name: tickets-system
description: Sistema enterprise desacoplado para gestion de tickets e incidencias de soporte.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --workspace backend run dev" "npm --workspace frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:init && npm run seed
scripts.db:init: npm run migrate || npm --workspace backend run sqlite:init
